REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-11-2016 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** MICHAEL RAY CHAMBERS APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT JUDY TRAN. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT CONFIRMED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD FRANCIS BROWN IS STILL IN CUSTODY AND THE COURT WAS NOT ABLE TO REACH HIM AND MR. BROWN HAS NOT REACHED OUT TO THE COURT AND HAS FAILED TO CONTACT THE COURT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
